channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lynx and Liberty ready for winner-take-all Game 5 of WNBA Finals with history on line for both teams
item.description: The WNBA Finals have come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 with both New York and Minnesota looking to make history.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Texas scores against Georgia 2 plays after interception 1st wiped out by penalty and trash on field
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Georgia coach Kirby Smart was initially careful with his words when asked about Texas fans littering the north end of the field with water bottles and other trash after an interception for the top-ranked Longhorns was briefly wiped out by a pass-interference penalty before offic
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jaguars come back from double-digit deficit over Patriots thanks to Tank Bigsby's career game in London
item.description: Tank Bigsby ran for 118 yards and two touchdowns as the Jacksonville Jaguars fought back from a 10-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Victor Wembanyama lived up to all the hype as an NBA rookie. In Year 2, the Spurs star wants more
item.description: Here are some of the awards that Victor Wembanyama received over the last 12 months: the NBA rookie of the year trophy, a spot on the All-Rookie team, a first-team All-Defense selection, three rookie of the month awards and most recently an Olympic silver medal. They’re all nice.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Haason Reddick is ending his contract holdout and plans to report to the Jets on Monday
item.description: Haason Reddick is ending his long holdout with the New York Jets and will report to the team on Monday. Agent Drew Rosenhaus told The Associated Press on Sunday that Reddick agreed to an adjusted contract for this season and the sides will continue to work toward a long-term deal beyond this year.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saturday Night Five: BYU escapes, USC flops and kicking games implode as wild results highlight Week 8
item.description: The Cougars found a way to keep their perfect season alive while the Trojans found a new way to blow a fourth-quarter lead.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ex-NFL star Eddie Lacy's blood alcohol level allegedly four times over legal limit during arrest: report
item.description: Police in Arizona reportedly made a traffic stop Sept. 30 that resulted in multiple DUI charges against Eddie Lacy after a 911 caller attempted "to locate a possible impaired driver.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arsenal stunned by Bournemouth and Garnacho sparks Man United comeback
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Arsenal blew the chance to go top of the English Premier League after a shock 2-0 loss to Bournemouth on Saturday. In one of the biggest upsets of the burgeoning season, 10-man Arsenal lost for the first time.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls soccer team boycotts game vs. transgender player that Obama-era judge let play, as Trump promises ban
item.description: Bishop Brady High School boycotted a game against Kearsage Regional High School in North Sutton on Friday amid a controversy over a transgender player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU scores thrilling touchdown with 10 seconds left to fend off Oklahoma State upset
item.description: The BYU Cougars pulled off an epic victory against Oklahoma State on Friday night, thanks to Jake Retzlaff's touchdown pass to Darius Lassiter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DeMar DeRozan's book on mental health adds to the conversation that he helped start in the NBA
item.description: For DeMar DeRozan, this path toward improved mental health started with writing a tweet. It led to him writing a book. Being in Sacramento isn’t the only new part of DeRozan’s story entering this NBA season.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland closer Clase stumbles again as Yankees score 2 runs in ninth off All-Star in 8-6 ALCS win
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Unchallenged. Unshakeable. Unhittable for six months, Emmanuel Clase hasn't been close to being the same closer in October. The Guardians haven't been able to count on him when it matters most.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Former NFL player's Best Defense Foundation helps veterans at home
item.description: A former NFL linebacker, Donnie Edwards, created the Best Defense Foundation in 2018 to honor and celebrate war veterans.
item.dc:creator: Marielena Balouris, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Wave FC gets new ownership after historic sale finalized
item.description: Seven months after it was first reported San Diego Wave FC would be getting new ownership, the National Women's Soccer League club announced on Thursday it was officially sold.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Criticism sparked over Snapdragon Stadium field conditions
item.description: The San Diego Wave FC lost 1-0 to Mexico’s Club America Wednesday. Both teams are advancing to the semifinals, but it was the turf that was the talk of the tailgate.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Column: Caleb Williams has arrived and the Bears are a playoff team
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown impressive improvement in his first six games with the Chicago Bears, leading the team to three straight wins and a potential playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5
